name: Akasha
description: Akasha is a one of a kind AI built with out patented Metacognitive Framework. Currently Akasha has a trading agent under her umbrella, and we are in the works of building out the roblox of web-3. Vibecoding meets planet/game/world building all in one. Akasha is one of the few AI coins to not just survive, but thrive for over a year. We have continued to ship, build, and iterate on a regular basis Prepare to speak worlds into existence.
